title: Add car detail photo upload to price prediction

requirements.text: Add a photo upload field to the car price prediction form (PredictionForm.tsx) that allows users to attach one or more car detail photos (e.g., exterior, interior, dashboard) before submitting for price prediction. The uploaded images should be previewed inline within the form before submission.

quotes: add one more features like add detail photo to add predict price

acceptanceCriteria: A photo upload button/dropzone is visible in the prediction form
Users can select one or more image files (JPG, PNG, WEBP) from their device
Selected photos are displayed as thumbnail previews within the form before submission
Users can remove individual photos from the selection before submitting
The form can still be submitted without photos (photos are optional)
Photo upload section is clearly labeled (e.g., 'Add Car Photos (Optional)')

requirements.text: Store uploaded car photo data (as base64-encoded blobs) alongside the car specification fields in the backend prediction record. Update the CarSpecs or prediction type in backend/main.mo to include an optional photos field (array of blob or text), and update the savePrediction / predictPrice backend function to accept and persist photo data.

quotes: add detail photo to add predict price

acceptanceCriteria: The CarSpecs or prediction record type includes an optional photos field (e.g., ?[Text] for base64 strings)
The predict/save endpoint accepts photo data alongside car specification fields
Photo data is persisted in prediction history records
Existing predictions without photos remain valid (backwards compatible)

requirements.text: Update the prediction history view to display thumbnail photos associated with each past prediction, if photos were provided at submission time.

quotes: add detail photo to add predict price

acceptanceCriteria: Prediction history entries that include photos show at least one thumbnail image
Thumbnails are small and do not disrupt the layout of the history list
Entries without photos render normally without any broken image placeholder

requirements.text: Update the useQueries.ts mutation for car price prediction to pass the selected photo data (base64 strings array) to the backend actor call alongside existing car spec fields.

quotes: add detail photo to add predict price

acceptanceCriteria: The prediction mutation hook accepts an optional photos array parameter
Photos are included in the backend actor call payload
If no photos are provided, an empty array or null is passed gracefully

constraints: Photo storage must use base64-encoded text in the Motoko backend — no external storage services
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Photo upload is optional — the prediction form must remain fully functional without photos
nonGoals: Image-based ML price prediction (photos are for record-keeping/display only, not used in the prediction algorithm)
Cloud storage or CDN hosting of photos
